{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Long
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Path of the Stellar Spear]], [[Stellar Spear madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[spirit-sense|spiritual sense]], Serpent's Shadow technique, Flowing Starlight technique, Star’s Edge techniques, [[Ancestor's Spear|Ancestor’s Spear]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[cycling technique]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, soulfire-enhanced madra}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Enforcer technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]], de facto leader of the Sandviper sect, [[Underlord]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, heir to a vassal sect of the Jai clan}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Blackflame]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, honored Sage}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai clan]], [[Sandviper sect]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Sect of Twin Stars]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|attendant, spearman}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Serpent's Grave]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

''See also: [[Jai Long Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai]] Long was a highly gifted [[sacred artist]] from the [[Jai clan]] who specialized in the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]]. Recognized as a prodigy, he reached the peak of [[Jade]] by age thirteen but was prevented from advancing to [[Lowgold]] by his clan's elders. Consequently, he was sent to the [[Desolate Wilds]] to serve as an attendant for the [[Sandviper sect]], acting as a representative of that group while supporting his family's interests. Throughout his career, he rose through the ranks of advancement, eventually reaching the level of [[Truegold]]. In combat, [[Jai]] Long utilized a white spear that could absorb the power of defeated [[Remnants]] to increase his own strength. His fighting style often involved forging white madra constructs, such as large serpents, to assist him or protect others. Despite his significant talent and status as a top fighter within the [[Sandviper sect]], he maintained a complex and often bitter relationship with his original clan. His [[life]] ended when he was killed by an attack from a [[Dreadgod]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|An exile from the [[Jai clan]] due to his [[Remnant]], [[Jai]] Long is a [[Highgold]] and an attendant who serves as the de facto leader of the [[Sandviper sect]]. Having reached the peak of [[Jade]] at thirteen years old, he possesses a foundation capable of reaching [[Underlord]] and follows the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] with an affinity second only to his clan's Patriarch. He is a tall spearman who wears dark robes and red cloth wrapped tightly around his head to form a scripted mask, leaving only his eyes visible. In combat, he utilizes [[Stellar Spear madra]] and an [[Iron body]] with a tiger-like crouching stance. Though he has previously outclassed [[Yerin]] in power, his future involves a high probability of engaging in a duel and seeking revenge for [[Kral]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">36</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a [[sacred artist]] who believes most are too consumed with gaining strength to consider how to use it.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] and [[Kral]] have reached the same stage of advancement in the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] wears red cloth wrapped tightly around his head, leaving only his eyes visible.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]]'s laugh sounds like the cackling of a deranged murderer.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a face he does not like.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] uses a spear.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] has an affinity for the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] that is second only to his clan's Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At thirteen years old, [[Jai Long]] reached the peak of [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a face that is scarred and twisted.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] wears ordinary dark robes and long strips of red cloth wrapped around his head.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]]'s head wraps are covered in script.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]]'s combat stance is described as crouching like a tiger about to pounce.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is an exile from the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] has a foundation that could potentially reach [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] wears a scripted mask.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] was cast out of the [[Jai clan]] because of his [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is an attendant of the [[Sandviper sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] observed the cages of captured [[miners]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] uses [[Stellar Spear madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] has the physical strength of an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a tall spearman wearing a mask of red cloth.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] follows the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is the de facto leader of the [[Sandviper sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]] who emerged from the door with a red-wrapped head.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a character.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is predicted to potentially tear through the halls of the [[Jai clan]] with a pure white spear that drinks the power of slain [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a low probability that [[Jai Long]] will be killed by a [[Jai]] [[Lowgold]] during battle.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a low probability that [[Jai Long]] will eventually die in isolation after his sister persuades him to end his crusade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a high probability that [[Jai Long]] will engage in an upcoming duel.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a high probability that [[Jai Long]] will be sabotaged by attackers before his duel, causing him to fight weak.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a high probability that [[Jai Long]] will be suppressed by the [[Jai Patriarch]] using a wound inflicted by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is predicted to take revenge on behalf of [[Kral]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] had faced [[Jai Long]] before her current state.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a powerful individual who outclassed [[Yerin]] in power.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A former heir to a vassal sect of the [[Jai clan]], [[Jai]] Long is a [[Truegold]] practitioner and the sibling of the clan guardian. While on the run from his clan and involved in a rebellion, he deviated from his [[Path]] by bonding a [[Remnant]] with different aspects, resulting in an inheritance that reshaped his jaw. He is a [[sacred arts]] practitioner and [[sword]] artist who utilizes the [[Ancestor’s Spear]], [[Star]]’s Edge techniques, [[Flowing Starlight]], and the [[Serpent's Shadow]]. During his travels through [[Serpent's Grave]], he rides a bat and wears red cloth bandages filled with flowing script that leave his eyes glittering at the center. As a dangerous opponent and rival to [[Lindon]], he is a specter looming over the [[Trial]], capable of fighting through violent storms and crashing into techniques with his bare hands.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">36</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is an opponent [[Lindon]] envisions fighting in an [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is capable of clearing the training course with his eyes closed.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is an heir to a vassal sect of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is currently on the run from his clan.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] possesses spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses the [[Serpent's Shadow]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses the [[Flowing Starlight]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a character who was struggling and half-blind.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] was leaving bleeding footprints in the grass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a former [[Jai clan]] heir and is considered dangerous even for a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] rides a bat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a practitioner of [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] deviated from his [[Path]] by bonding a [[Remnant]] with different aspects.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]]'s original plan was to kill two [[Jai]] Lowgolds and capture their [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a person [[Lindon]] seeks to defeat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is mentioned by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has an obligation to [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a specter looming over the [[Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Trial]] is intended as a first step toward defeating [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] believes [[Lindon]] will be killed by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is involved in a rebellion.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] has broken through to [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is the sibling of the clan guardian.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] wears red cloth bandages over his face that are filled with flowing script.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]]'s eyes glitter in the center of his mask.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a character who can crash into [[Yerin]]'s technique with his hand.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a [[sword]] artist who can fight through the violent storm of [[Yerin]]'s advancement.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a stranger to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses the [[Ancestor’s Spear]] to gain power.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses [[Star]]’s Edge techniques.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] has an inheritance from a serpentine [[Remnant]] that reshapes his jaw.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] was unsure if he was up to a specific task.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is [[Jai Chen]]'s brother.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is one of the few people who talks to [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] is a young man who has a rivalry with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai]] Long is a [[Blackflame]] who serves the [[Jai clan]] under an oath. During a duel where [[Eithan]] used him as motivation for [[Lindon]], the combatant utilized [[Truegold]] [[madra]] in his skin and a cycling technique to defeat his opponent. Throughout the fight, [[Jai]] Long's attacks created serpent outlines and he eventually removed [[Lindon]]'s arm. After casting aside the [[Ancestor's Spear]], which he had previously used to advance from [[Highgold]] to [[Truegold]], he scooped up his sister, [[Jai Chen]], and cried out for help. Following the battle, this warrior who is considered close to [[Eithan]]'s level departed without further words.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">24</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has an approaching duel with [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] mentions [[Jai Long]] as an opponent to defeat.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is a [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is at the mercy of [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] possesses [[Truegold]] [[madra]] in his skin.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] has blue, shark-like fangs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] cast the [[Ancestor's Spear]] aside.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] scooped up [[Jai Chen]] and backed away.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]]'s attacks create serpent outlines.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is under an oath to serve the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is a character who emitted a twisting white light from his chest.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] cries out for help for his sister.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] was previously targeted by a [[Snare]] [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] used [[Jai Long]] as motivation for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] was the one who actually removed [[Lindon]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is a figure whose victory would affect the reputation of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is considered to be close to [[Eithan]]'s level.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] uses a white-edged spear to fight blood-creatures.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] has a sister.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] uses a cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] departed without further words.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] went from [[Highgold]] to [[Truegold]] using the [[Ancestor's Spear]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is a boy [[Lindon]] has fought.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]] is a character who defeated [[Lindon]] in a duel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] prepared to fight [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Jai Long]] was involved in a battle where [[Yerin]] advanced to [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Jai Long]] is a lean man wearing simple brown clothes and carrying an ornate spear with a blue haft.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An [[Underlord]] who possesses no interest in the [[sacred arts]], [[Jai]] Long serves as an ally to [[Kelsa]] with a promise to rescue her parents. During his interactions with the guardians of the [[Fallen Leaf School]], he speaks with a cold demeanor, revealing white madra that manifests across his skin as shining serpentine tattoos. While he interacts with [[Eithan]], he is notably absent from the cloudship. Utilizing [[soulfire]]-enhanced [[madra]] and wielding the halves of a broken spear as weapons, he eventually becomes exhausted and weak in spirit. Ultimately, [[Jai Chen]] is forced to transport him on a stretcher atop a hovering [[construct]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] is [[Kelsa]]'s ally who promised to get her parents out.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] spoke coldly to the guardians of the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]]'s [[madra]] is white and appears on his skin like shining serpentine tattoos.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] has no interest in the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] is a character who interacts with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] was not present on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] uses [[soulfire]]-enhanced [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] is exhausted and weak in spirit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Long]] uses the halves of a broken spear as weapons.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] carried [[Jai Long]] on a stretcher atop a hovering [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A member of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]], [[Jai]] Long begins his days by meditating on the fundamental nature of his [[madra]]. As a peak [[Truegold]] possessing [[soulfire]] within his spirit, he eventually begins the process of advancing to the [[Underlord]] stage. During a conflict, he utilizes an [[Enforcer technique]] while serving as part of the squad that was battered and burned.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] meditates on the nature of his [[madra]] every morning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] is a peak [[Truegold]] with [[soulfire]] in his spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] is a member of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] is advancing to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] has [[soulfire]] in his spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] is a member of the squad that was battered and burned.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Having grown much stronger in spirit, [[Jai]] Long appears without a mask and wearing a [[Twin Star emblem]] on his outer robe. He carries a red strip of scripted cloth around his forehead, and blue light can be seen leaking from inside his mouth. [[Lindon]] addresses him as an honored [[Sage]], noting that his body was forged in [[soulfire]]. Following a fatal encounter where he was targeted by [[madra]] of every aspect and earth eruptions, his blue-white serpentine [[Remnant]] was released. [[Jai]] Long is eventually noted as being missing from the camp.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] no longer wears a mask.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] has a red strip of scripted cloth wrapped around his forehead.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]]'s spirit is much stronger than before.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] has blue light leaking from the inside of his mouth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] wears a [[Twin Star emblem]] on his outer robe.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] is addressed as 'honored [[Sage]]' by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]]'s body was forged in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] died after being targeted by earth eruptions and [[madra]] of every aspect.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]]'s [[Remnant]] was blue-white and serpentine.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] is missing from the camp.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Long]] was killed by the attack of a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“The most we can hope for is a temporary truce,” Jai Long said from behind his scripted mask.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Jai Long raised his head, crying out in a hoarse voice. “Please, help her!”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Kelsa, this is…hopeless. Come with us. I promise you, I can get your parents out.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"I have nothing left to do with the sacred arts. I’m done."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Jai clan]]
[[Category:Sandviper sect]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
